about_text: Genaro Landscape is an owner-operated landscaping service company based in Huntington Beach, CA. We have been serving business and residential customers in Orange County with affordable yard work, lawn care, garden maintenance and landscaping services since 1999.

value_propositions.title: Garden Care
value_propositions.description: With our range of lawn & garden care services covering anything you might need, we're proud to be your one-stop provider!

value_propositions.title: Seasoned Team
value_propositions.description: All of our crew members are experienced pros who find real joy in making any given garden or lawn look nicer!

value_propositions.title: Customer-Oriented Service
value_propositions.description: We value the service we provide and our loyal returning customers can always expect some appreciation from us, like a future service discount or a gift.

value_propositions.title: Affordable Price
value_propositions.description: We aim to make our service as reasonably priced as possible.

promo: $15 Off On Your First Appointment — JUST MENTION 'HAPPY LAWN'

testimonials.name: John
testimonials.text: Genaro and his team did a great job repairing and replacing sprinklers, removing turf and adding sod and removing overgrown bushes in both our front and back yards. We are extremely happy with their work and we are in love with our front and back yards. I highly recommend these guys and would use their services again.

testimonials.name: Amy
testimonials.text: We moved into a new property with a totally empty yard in Huntington Beach. A friend recommended Genaro Landscape. They were on time for all appointments and were very professional and understood what we wanted and designed the perfect space for us. We are happy about the final results and we are hiring their services for weekly maintenance as well.

testimonials.name: Mary
testimonials.text: I was in the process of remodeling our older home in Garden Grove and was in desperate need of a landscaper to replace trees and install new sod, plants, and irrigation system. Genaro and his crew were a wonderful team to work with! They listened to our ideas and created a plan that both fit our budget and must haves. We are thrilled with the final results. Genaro Landscape is the best!
